info.title: Access Approval
info.description: The system access-approval workflow (design section 16.5.1). It notifies the approver that an access request needs a decision, suspends durably awaiting that decision on the access.decision channel, and on approval writes the capped, time-boxed grant through the control plane's bounded grant operation. The notify steps are the editable part: approvals administrators may enrich them (for example a Slack or email notification) without changing the decision correlation or the grant. The two load-bearing steps are the awaitDecision receive (the human decision point) and the grantAccess operation (the platform-capped grant).

workflows.summary: Approve or reject an access request, then enact the decision.
workflows.description: Notify, await the decision, and grant on approval. Started by the control plane when a request is submitted that needs a human decision; the request id is the correlation token.

requestId.description: The access request awaiting a decision (the correlation token).

requestedScopes.description: The scopes the request asked for.

steps.description: Announce that the request needs a decision. This send also registers the request-id correlation the awaitDecision step matches on. Approvals administrators may add further notify steps (Slack, email) around it.
Suspend durably until the approver's decision arrives on access.decision, correlated by the request id. The approve / approveAsEligible / deny touchpoints each publish it with the matching outcome.
Enact the approved decision — write the capped, time-boxed grant — through the control plane's single settlement operation, presenting the system credential.
Announce that the request was granted. Editable by approvals administrators.

Enact the eligible decision — write standing eligibility (design section 16.5.3) — through the control plane's single settlement operation, presenting the system credential. The requester may thereafter self-elevate this access JIT without re-approval.
Announce that the requester was granted standing eligibility. Editable by approvals administrators.

Enact the rejected decision — mark the request Denied — through the control plane's single settlement operation, so a denial flows through the approval run exactly like an approval instead of short-circuiting it. Falls through to notifyDenied.
Announce that the request was rejected. Editable by approvals administrators. Reached only when the approver declined.
Announce that the requester withdrew the request, so the approver need take no action. Editable by approvals administrators. Reached only when the request was withdrawn.
